properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v5 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: One day every eye will behold Him, Lifted up high and exalted We will behold the King One day all that's opposed him will crumble Every man be made humble We will behold the King One day we who have waited will see Him, We who have prayed-

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Come quickly Lord, come quickly Lord It's that day that we are looking towards We want to see your glory Come quickly Lord, come quickly Lord You're the one that we are waiting for Come quickly Lord

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: One day heartache and suffering will vanish, Sickness and pain will be ended As we behold the King One day death will be conquered forever, And he will descend in his glory And we behold our King The spirit and the Bride together testify-

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: For no ear hath heard, no eye hath seen No tongue can declare your majesty Be exalted, be praised as we lift up your name And your people declare your glory

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Every knee shall bow Every tongue confess He is Lord, He is Lord Every eye shall see Jesus lifted high For He is Lord, He Is Lord
